'''wachaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaav|vaav]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ch-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaav|vaav]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wachaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæchæbæth|wæchæbæth]] || [[word:wæchæbæj|wæchæbæj]] || [[word:wæchæbæsh|wæchæbæsh]] || [[word:wæchæbæ|wæchæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wachachabath|wachachabath]] || [[word:wachachabaj|wachachabaj]] || [[word:wachachabash|wachachabash]] || [[word:wachachaba|wachachaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wachabath|wachabath]] || [[word:wachabaj|wachabaj]] || [[word:wachabash|wachabash]] || [[word:wachaba|wachaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wachafbath|wachafbath]] || [[word:wachafbaj|wachafbaj]] || [[word:wachafbash|wachafbash]] || [[word:wachafbaf|wachafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wachabatha|wachabatha]] || [[word:wachabaja|wachabaja]] || [[word:wachabasha|wachabasha]] || [[word:wachabaka|wachabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wachabath|wachabath]] || [[word:wachabaj|wachabaj]] || [[word:wachabash|wachabash]] || [[word:wachaba|wachaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wachabathal|wachabathal]] || [[word:wachabajal|wachabajal]] || [[word:wachabashal|wachabashal]] || [[word:wachabakal|wachabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wachabathatha|wachabathatha]] || [[word:wachabajaja|wachabajaja]] || [[word:wachabashasha|wachabashasha]] || [[word:wachabaka|wachabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wachabathan|wachabathan]] || [[word:wachabajan|wachabajan]] || [[word:wachabashan|wachabashan]] || [[word:wachabakan|wachabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wachabathaoro|wachabathaoro]] || [[word:wachabajaoro|wachabajaoro]] || [[word:wachabashaoro|wachabashaoro]] || [[word:wachabakaoro|wachabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
